overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The journey progresses from a narrow steam-filled corridor beneath elevated highways to a wider intersection with passing vehicles and vibrant signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban corridor beneath elevated highway with industrial steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure with steam vents on the left

entered.detail: industrial steam vents releasing white smoke along the left wall
massive concrete overpass structure overhead casting shadows on the street
tall vertical pink neon sign with Japanese characters on the right building
abandoned yellow vehicle crashed against the left barrier with overgrown weeds
low concrete railing separating sidewalk from the steam vent area
circular industrial fan embedded in the left wall with steam passing through

segments.scene_description: The character walks straight through a narrow urban corridor beneath an elevated highway. Steam vents release white smoke along the left wall near a crashed yellow vehicle, while pink neon signs illuminate the right side of the street. The environment feels enclosed and industrial with concrete barriers and massive overhead structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving street transitioning from narrow corridor to wider urban vista

events.description: path curves right opening from narrow corridor to wider street view with distant skyscrapers visible

agents.ego_description: following the curved sidewalk as the street opens up to reveal more of the cityscape and distant buildings

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction as the character

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying colorful animated advertisements
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance beyond the overpass
tall street lamp with multiple fixtures and electrical boxes

segments.scene_description: The character turns right as the narrow corridor opens into a wider street view. A pedestrian walks ahead in the same direction while distant skyscrapers become visible beyond the overpass. The steam vents recede into the distance as colorful digital billboards and street lamps come into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved multi-lane street with elevated highway ramps and neon commercial signage

events.description: futuristic sports car with glowing red taillights passes by on the right side of the street
character continues walking along the curve approaching the Allen Street intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved road as futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent street

notable_agents.action: futuristic teal sports car driving past on the street to the right
person in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk maintaining distance

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Allen' mounted on a pole
tree with pink blossoms visible on the right side near the buildings
tall pole with traffic lights and electrical transformers

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved road beneath multiple elevated highway ramps. A futuristic sports car passes by on the right while a pedestrian walks ahead. The street sign for 'Allen' becomes visible in the distance, and a cherry blossom tree adds a touch of nature to the cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalks and multi-story commercial buildings with neon facades

events.description: character turns left at the Allen Street intersection crossing the road
entering a new street with different building facades featuring a distinctive green circular building and uphill slope

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning left onto a new street with colorful building facades and upward slope

notable_agents.action: white car driving through the intersection in the opposite direction

entered.detail: distinctive green building with circular window on the corner of the intersection
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
street ascending uphill with various storefronts and signs visible in the distance
building facade illuminated with bright pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the intersection at Allen Street, turning left onto a new road. A distinctive green building with a circular window marks the corner, while crosswalk markings cover the ground. The new street features an uphill slope with various neon-lit storefronts, and the elevated highway structure disappears from view as the character enters this new zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a sprawling, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by tracking the character straight through a narrow passage beneath an elevated highway, where white steam vents and a crashed yellow vehicle line the concrete walls under the glow of pink neon signs. As the character turns right, the enclosed environment expands, leaving the steam and overhead structures behind to reveal a wider street view. The scene then opens further to show a pedestrian walking ahead while the horizon shifts to reveal towering skyscrapers and vibrant digital billboards. Finally, the perspective broadens to encompass the full scale of the city's architecture and street lamps under the vivid lights of the district.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered urban underpass into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial district. It begins along a curved road beneath the heavy concrete ramps of elevated highways, passing a futuristic sports car and a solitary cherry blossom tree. As the character moves forward, the scene opens up at the Allen Street intersection, where the camera tracks across marked crosswalks and past a distinctive green building with a circular window. The perspective then shifts as the character turns left, ascending an uphill slope lined with glowing storefronts. Finally, the oppressive highway structures vanish from view, leaving the camera immersed in the open, brightly lit atmosphere of the new city zone.
